---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the plugin doesn't support well today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you'd like to see. If you have a rough API or UI in mind, sketch it.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds have you tried? What other approaches did you consider and reject?

## Additional context

Links to related issues, Exasol docs, Grafana plugin docs, or example SQL.
